name: _Temp Add Completed State to SO Workflow
report_name: _Temp Add Completed State to SO Workflow
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    results = []

    existing_states = frappe.db.get_all(
        'Workflow Document State',
        filters={'parent': 'Sales Order', 'state': 'Completed'},
        fields=['name']
    )

    if not existing_states:
        max_idx_result = frappe.db.sql(
            "SELECT IFNULL(MAX(idx), 0) FROM `tabWorkflow Document State` WHERE parent='Sales Order'"
        )
        max_idx = max_idx_result[0][0] if max_idx_result else 0

        new_name = frappe.generate_hash('', 10)
        frappe.db.sql("""
            INSERT INTO `tabWorkflow Document State`
            (name, parent, parentfield, parenttype, state, doc_status,
             update_field, update_value, allow_edit, idx, creation, modified, modified_by, owner)
            VALUES (%s, 'Sales Order', 'states', 'Workflow', 'Completed', '1',
             'status', 'Completed', 'System Manager', %s, NOW(), NOW(), 'Administrator', 'Administrator')
        """, (new_name, max_idx + 1))
        results.append('Completed state ADDED to workflow')
    else:
        results.append('Completed state already exists')

    existing_trans = frappe.db.get_all(
        'Workflow Transition',
        filters={'parent': 'Sales Order', 'action': 'Mark as Completed'},
        fields=['name']
    )

    if not existing_trans:
        max_idx_t_result = frappe.db.sql(
            "SELECT IFNULL(MAX(idx), 0) FROM `tabWorkflow Transition` WHERE parent='Sales Order'"
        )
        max_idx_t = max_idx_t_result[0][0] if max_idx_t_result else 0

        new_name_t = frappe.generate_hash('', 10)
        frappe.db.sql("""
            INSERT INTO `tabWorkflow Transition`
            (name, parent, parentfield, parenttype, state, action, next_state, allowed,
             idx, creation, modified, modified_by, owner)
            VALUES (%s, 'Sales Order', 'transitions', 'Workflow', 'To Deliver and Bill',
             'Mark as Completed', 'Completed', 'Administrator', %s, NOW(), NOW(), 'Administrator', 'Administrator')
        """, (new_name_t, max_idx_t + 1))
        results.append('Mark as Completed transition ADDED')
    else:
        results.append('Mark as Completed transition already exists')

    frappe.db.commit()

    columns = [{'fieldname': 'result', 'label': 'Result', 'fieldtype': 'Data', 'width': 500}]
    data = [{'result': r} for r in results]
    return columns, data

name: Trial Balance (Simple)
query:
select fiscal_year as "Fiscal Year:Data:80",
	company as "Company:Data:220",
	posting_date as "Posting Date:Date:100",
	account as "Account:Data:380",
	sum(debit) as "Debit:Currency:140",
	sum(credit) as "Credit:Currency:140",
	finance_book as "Finance Book:Link/Finance Book:140"
from `tabGL Entry`
where is_cancelled = 0 and company = %(company)s
group by fiscal_year, company, posting_date, account
order by fiscal_year, company, posting_date, account

name: Employee Checkin Area Report
query:
SELECT
    sp.name AS area,
    e.employee_name AS employee_name,
    ec.log_type AS log_type,
    COALESCE(ec.time, ec.creation) AS time,
    COALESCE(ec.custom_address, ec.custom_location_name) AS location
FROM `tabEmployee Checkin` ec
INNER JOIN `tabSales Person` sp ON sp.employee = ec.employee
LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee` e ON e.name = ec.employee
ORDER BY sp.name, e.employee_name, ec.time, ec.creation

name: BOM Stock Report
query:
SELECT 
	bom_item.item_code as "Item:Link/Item:200",
	bom_item.description as "Description:Data:300",
	bom_item.qty as "Required Qty:Float:100",
	ledger.actual_qty  as "In Stock Qty:Float:100",
	FLOOR(ledger.actual_qty /bom_item.qty) as "Enough Parts to Build:Int:100"
FROM
	`tabBOM Item` AS bom_item 
	LEFT JOIN `tabBin` AS ledger	
		ON bom_item.item_code = ledger.item_code  
		AND ledger.warehouse = %(warehouse)s
WHERE
	bom_item.parent=%(bom)s

GROUP BY bom_item.item_code

name: Detailed Overdues in Sales Invoice
query: SELECT si.name as "Sales Invoice", si.customer_name as "Customer", si.due_date as "Due Date", si.outstanding_amount as "Outstanding Amount", DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) as "Days Overdue" FROM `tabSales Invoice` si WHERE si.outstanding_amount > 0 AND si.due_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY si.due_date ASC

name: Custom Sales Invoice Export
query: SELECT name AS `Invoice ID`, posting_date AS `Date`, customer AS `Customer`, grand_total AS `Total Amount`, status AS `Status`, due_date AS `Due Date`, outstanding_amount AS `Outstanding` FROM `tabSales Invoice` WHERE docstatus = 1

name: Annual Sales Report
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    data = frappe.db.sql("""SELECT YEAR(posting_date) as year, SUM(grand_total) as total_sales
                           FROM `tabSales Invoice`
                           WHERE docstatus = 1
                           GROUP BY YEAR(posting_date)
                           ORDER BY year""", as_dict=True)
    columns = [
        {"fieldname": "year", "label": "Year", "fieldtype": "Int", "width": 100},
        {"fieldname": "total_sales", "label": "Total Sales", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 150}
    ]
    return columns, data

name: Sales Order Delivery Overview
query:
SELECT
    so.name AS "Sales Order",
    so.customer AS "Customer",
    so.customer_name AS "Customer Name",
    soi.item_code AS "Item Code",
    soi.item_name AS "Item Name",
    soi.qty AS "Ordered Qty",
    soi.delivered_qty AS "Delivered Qty",
    soi.qty - soi.delivered_qty as "SO Balance",
    IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(dni.qty)
        FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni
        JOIN `tabDelivery Note` dn ON dn.name = dni.parent
        WHERE dni.so_detail = soi.name
          AND dn.docstatus = 0
    ), 0) AS "Draft DR Qty",
    soi.delivery_date AS "SO Delivery Date",
    so.status AS "SO Status" 
    
    
    
FROM `tabSales Order` so
JOIN `tabSales Order Item` soi ON soi.parent = so.name
WHERE so.docstatus = 1 AND soi.qty  <> soi.delivered_qty
AND so.status  = 'To Deliver and Bill' 
ORDER BY so.transaction_date DESC

name: SO Delivery Progress
query:
SELECT so.name AS "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:130", so.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:140", soi.delivery_date AS "Date:Date:100", so.status as "Status::130", soi.item_code AS "Item Code:Link/Item:180", soi.item_name AS "Item Name::0", soi.qty AS "Ordered Qty:Float:100", soi.delivered_qty AS "Delivered Qty:Float:120", -- Draft DR Qty IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(dni.qty) FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni JOIN `tabDelivery Note` dn ON dn.name = dni.parent WHERE dni.so_detail = soi.name AND dn.docstatus = 0 ), 0) AS "Draft DR Qty:Float:120", -- Related Delivery Note numbers (submitted only) IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dn.name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni JOIN `tabDelivery Note` dn ON dn.name = dni.parent WHERE dni.so_detail = soi.name AND dn.docstatus = 1 ), '-') AS "Delivery Notes(Completed):Link/Delivery Note:200", -- Related Delivery Note numbers (submitted only) IFNULL(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dn.name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni JOIN `tabDelivery Note` dn ON dn.name = dni.parent WHERE dni.so_detail = soi.name AND dn.docstatus = 0 ), '-') AS "Delivery Notes(Draft):Link/Delivery Note:200", -- Progress Bar (delivered only) CONCAT( '
', '
', ROUND(IFNULL(soi.delivered_qty / NULLIF(soi.qty, 0), 0) * 100, 1), '%%
' ) AS "Progress (Delivered Only):HTML:180", -- Progress Bar (ALL) CONCAT( '
', '
', ROUND(IFNULL((soi.delivered_qty + (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dni.qty), 0) FROM `tabDelivery Note Item` dni JOIN `tabDelivery Note` dn ON dn.name = dni.parent WHERE dni.so_detail = soi.name AND dn.docstatus = 0) ) / NULLIF(soi.qty, 0), 0) * 100, 1), '%%
' ) AS "Progress (ALL):HTML:180" FROM `tabSales Order` so JOIN `tabSales Order Item` soi ON soi.parent = so.name WHERE so.docstatus = 1 ORDER BY so.transaction_date DESC, so.name DESC

name: PR Printout
query:
SELECT 
    mr.name AS "Request No:Link/Material Request:120",
    mr.transaction_date AS "Date:Date:100",
    mr.material_request_type AS "Type:Data:120",
    mri.item_code AS "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
    mri.item_name AS "Item Name:Data:200",
    mri.qty AS "Qty:Float:80",
    mri.uom AS "UOM:Link/UOM:60",
    mri.schedule_date AS "Required Date:Date:100"
FROM `tabMaterial Request` mr
JOIN `tabMaterial Request Item` mri 
    ON mr.name = mri.parent
WHERE mr.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY mr.transaction_date DESC

name: Sales Vs Forecast
query:
SELECT * FROM (

    -- 1️⃣ Targets (with or without sales)
    SELECT
        sp.parent_sales_person AS "Parent Sales Person:Link/Sales Person:180",
        td.parent AS "Sales Person:Link/Sales Person:180",
        td.item_group AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:150",
        '' AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
        '' AS "Item Name::180",
        td.target_amount AS "Target:Currency:120",
        COALESCE(SUM(sii.base_net_amount), 0) AS "Achieved:Currency:120",
        (COALESCE(SUM(sii.base_net_amount), 0) - td.target_amount) AS "Variance:Currency:120"
    FROM `tabTarget Detail` td
    JOIN `tabSales Person` sp ON sp.name = td.parent
    LEFT JOIN `tabSales Team` st ON st.sales_person = td.parent
    LEFT JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = st.parent
        AND si.docstatus = 1
        AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    LEFT JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
        AND sii.item_group = td.item_group
    WHERE td.parenttype = 'Sales Person'
      AND td.fiscal_year = %(fiscal_year)s
    GROUP BY sp.parent_sales_person, td.parent, td.item_group, td.target_amount

    UNION ALL

    -- 2️⃣ Sales without targets (so they don’t get lost)
    SELECT
        sp.parent_sales_person,
        st.sales_person,
        sii.item_group,
        '' AS item_code,
        '' AS item_name,
        0,
        SUM(sii.base_net_amount),
        SUM(sii.base_net_amount) -- variance = same as achieved since no target
    FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
    JOIN `tabSales Team` st ON st.parent = si.name
    JOIN `tabSales Person` sp ON sp.name = st.sales_person
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
    WHERE si.docstatus = 1
      AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM `tabTarget Detail` td
          WHERE td.parent = st.sales_person
            AND td.item_group = sii.item_group
            AND td.fiscal_year = %(fiscal_year)s
            AND td.parenttype = 'Sales Person'
      )
    GROUP BY sp.parent_sales_person, st.sales_person, sii.item_group

    UNION ALL

    -- 3️⃣ Item-level breakdown (target = 0, variance = 0)
    SELECT
        sp.parent_sales_person,
        st.sales_person,
        sii.item_group,
        sii.item_code,
        sii.item_name,
        0,
        SUM(sii.base_net_amount),
        0
    FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
    JOIN `tabSales Team` st ON st.parent = si.name
    JOIN `tabSales Person` sp ON sp.name = st.sales_person
    JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
    WHERE si.docstatus = 1
      AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    GROUP BY sp.parent_sales_person, st.sales_person, sii.item_group, sii.item_code, sii.item_name
) x
ORDER BY 1,2,3,4;

name: Maintenance Schedules
query:
SELECT
    ms_sch.scheduled_date as "Schedule Date:Date:120",
	ms_sch.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	ms_sch.item_name as "Item Name::120",
	ms_sch.serial_no as "Serial No::120",
	ms_sch.sales_person as "Sales Person::120",
	ms.customer_name as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	ms.address_display as "Customer Address::120",
	ms_item.sales_order as "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:120",
	ms.company as "Company:Link/Company:120"
	
FROM
	`tabMaintenance Schedule` ms, 
    `tabMaintenance Schedule Detail` ms_sch, 
    `tabMaintenance Schedule Item` ms_item
WHERE
	ms.name = ms_sch.parent and ms.name = ms_item.parent and ms.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY
	ms_sch.scheduled_date asc, ms_sch.item_code asc

name: Fuel Mortgage Report
query:
select Name as "Vehicle Log ID", 
license_plate as "License Plate",
DATE,
Case when custom_odometer_reset = 1 then
	custom_odometer_reset_value
	Else odometer END as "Odometer",
fuel_qty as "Fuel Quantity",
price as "Price",
supplier as "Supplier",
invoice as "Invoice"
 from `tabVehicle Log` where fuel_qty > 0

name: Issued Items Against Work Order
query:
select
    ste.work_order as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    ste.posting_date as "Issue Date:Date:140",
    ste_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	ste_item.description as "Description::150",
	ste_item.transfer_qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	ste_item.stock_uom as "UOM:Link/UOM:80",
	ste_item.amount as "Amount:Currency:120",
	ste_item.serial_no as "Serial No:Link/Serial No:80",
	ste_item.s_warehouse as "Source Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
	ste_item.t_warehouse as "Target Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
	wo.production_item as "Finished Goods:Link/Item:120", 
	ste.name as "Stock Entry:Link/Stock Entry:120",
	ste.company as "Company:Link/Company:",
	(select bin.projected_qty from `tabBin` bin 
			where  bin.item_code= ste_item.item_code and bin.warehouse= ste_item.s_warehouse) as "Projected Quantity as Source:Float:200"
from	`tabStock Entry` ste, `tabStock Entry Detail` ste_item, `tabWork Order` wo
where
	ifnull(ste.work_order, '') != '' and ste.name = ste_item.parent 
	and ste.work_order = wo.name and ste.docstatus = 1
	and ste.purpose = 'Material Transfer for Manufacture'
order by ste.posting_date, ste.work_order, ste_item.item_code

name: Customers Without Any Sales Transactions
query:
SELECT
	`tabCustomer`.name as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	`tabCustomer`.customer_name as "Customer Name::120",
	`tabCustomer`.territory as "Territory:Link/Territory:120",
	`tabCustomer`.customer_group as "Customer Group:Link/Customer Group:120"
FROM
	`tabCustomer`
WHERE
	not exists(select name from `tabSales Invoice` where `tabCustomer`.name = `tabSales Invoice`.customer and `tabSales Invoice`.docstatus=1 limit 1)
	and not exists(select name from `tabSales Order` where `tabCustomer`.name = `tabSales Order`.customer and `tabSales Order`.docstatus=1 limit 1)

name: Delivered Items To Be Billed
query:
select
    `tabDelivery Note`.`name` as "Delivery Note:Link/Delivery Note:120",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`customer` as "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`customer_name` as "Customer Name::150",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`posting_date` as "Date:Date",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`project` as "Project",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`item_code` as "Item:Link/Item:120",
	(`tabDelivery Note Item`.`base_amount` - `tabDelivery Note Item`.`billed_amt`*ifnull(`tabDelivery Note`.conversion_rate, 1)) as "Pending Amount:Currency:110",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`item_name` as "Item Name::150",
	`tabDelivery Note Item`.`description` as "Description::200",
	`tabDelivery Note`.`company` as "Company:Link/Company:"
from `tabDelivery Note`, `tabDelivery Note Item`
where  
    `tabDelivery Note`.name = `tabDelivery Note Item`.parent 
    and `tabDelivery Note`.docstatus = 1 
    and `tabDelivery Note`.`status` not in ("Stopped", "Closed") 
    and `tabDelivery Note Item`.amount > 0
    and `tabDelivery Note Item`.billed_amt < `tabDelivery Note Item`.amount
order by `tabDelivery Note`.`name` desc

name: Received Items To Be Billed
query:
select
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.`name` as "Purchase Receipt:Link/Purchase Receipt:120",
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.`supplier` as "Supplier:Link/Supplier:120",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`supplier_name` as "Supplier Name::150",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`posting_date` as "Date:Date",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`project` as "Project",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`item_code` as "Item:Link/Item:120",
	(`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`base_amount` - `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`billed_amt`*ifnull(`tabPurchase Receipt`.conversion_rate, 1)) as "Pending Amount:Currency:110",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`item_name` as "Item Name::150",
	`tabPurchase Receipt Item`.`description` as "Description::200",
	`tabPurchase Receipt`.`company` as "Company:Link/Company:"
from `tabPurchase Receipt`, `tabPurchase Receipt Item`
where
    `tabPurchase Receipt`.name = `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.parent 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt`.docstatus = 1 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt`.status != "Closed" 
    and `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.amount > 0
    and `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.billed_amt < `tabPurchase Receipt Item`.amount
order by `tabPurchase Receipt`.`name` desc

name: Material Requests for which Supplier Quotations are not created
query:
select 
    mr.name as "Material Request:Link/Material Request:120",
    mr.transaction_date as "Date:Date:100",
	mr_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	mr_item.qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	mr_item.item_name as "Item Name::150",
	mr_item.description as "Description::200",
	mr.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
from
	`tabMaterial Request` mr, `tabMaterial Request Item` mr_item
where
	mr_item.parent = mr.name
	and mr.material_request_type = "Purchase"
	and mr.docstatus = 1
	and mr.status != "Stopped"
	and not exists(select name from `tabSupplier Quotation Item` where material_request=mr.name)
order by mr.transaction_date asc

name: Serial No Service Contract Expiry
Requested Items To Be Transferred
query:
select 
    mr.name as "Material Request:Link/Material Request:120",
	mr.transaction_date as "Date:Date:100",
	mr_item.item_code as "Item Code:Link/Item:120",
	mr_item.qty as "Qty:Float:100",
	mr_item.ordered_qty as "Transferred Qty:Float:100", 
	(mr_item.qty - ifnull(mr_item.ordered_qty, 0)) as "Qty to Transfer:Float:100",
	mr_item.item_name as "Item Name::150",
	mr_item.description as "Description::200",
	mr.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
from
	`tabMaterial Request` mr, `tabMaterial Request Item` mr_item
where
	mr_item.parent = mr.name
	and mr.material_request_type in ("Material Transfer", "Material Issue")
	and mr.docstatus = 1
	and mr.status != "Stopped"
	and ifnull(mr_item.ordered_qty, 0) < ifnull(mr_item.qty, 0)
order by mr.transaction_date asc

name: Accountability Summary
query:
WITH latest_movement AS (
    SELECT
        ami.asset,
        am.name AS movement_name,
        am.transaction_date,
        am.custom_remarks,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ami.asset ORDER BY am.transaction_date DESC, am.name DESC) AS rn
    FROM `tabAsset Movement` am
    JOIN `tabAsset Movement Item` ami ON am.name = ami.parent
    WHERE am.workflow_state IN ('Checked', 'Received')
),
movement_count AS (
    SELECT
        ami.asset,
        COUNT(*) AS movement_count
    FROM `tabAsset Movement` am
    JOIN `tabAsset Movement Item` ami ON am.name = ami.parent
    WHERE am.workflow_state IN ('Checked', 'Received')
    GROUP BY ami.asset
)

SELECT 
    CASE WHEN a.custom_custodian_name IS NULL OR a.custom_custodian_name = '' THEN a.custom_section
    else a.custom_custodian_name END as "Employee / Section:data:140",
    CASE 
        WHEN mc.movement_count >= 3 THEN lm.movement_name
        ELSE a.name 
    END AS "Doc No.:data:100",
    CASE 
        WHEN mc.movement_count >= 2 THEN DATE_FORMAT(lm.transaction_date,'%%m/%%d/%%Y')
        ELSE DATE_FORMAT(a.available_for_use_date,'%%m/%%d/%%Y')
    END AS "Date",
    a.asset_name AS "Asset Name",
    a.gross_purchase_amount AS "Unit Cost",
    a.purchase_receipt AS "Ref WRR",
    a.custom_notes AS "Notes",
    CASE 
        WHEN mc.movement_count >= 2 THEN lm.custom_remarks
        ELSE '' 
    END AS "Remarks"

FROM `tabAsset` a
LEFT JOIN movement_count mc ON mc.asset = a.name
LEFT JOIN latest_movement lm ON lm.asset = a.name AND lm.rn = 1
WHERE a.disposal_date IS NULL 
  AND a.calculate_depreciation = 0 
  AND a.docstatus < 2
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.custom_custodian_name IS NULL OR a.custom_custodian_name = '' THEN a.custom_section
    else a.custom_custodian_name END, a.custom_notes ASC

json: {"add_total_row": 0, "sort_by": "Serial No.name", "sort_order": "desc", "sort_by_next": null, "filters": [], "sort_order_next": "desc", "columns": [["name", "Serial No"], ["item_code", "Serial No"], ["warehouse", "Serial No"], ["item_name", "Serial No"], ["description", "Serial No"], ["item_group", "Serial No"], ["brand", "Serial No"],["purchase_document_no", "Serial No"]]}
name: Serial No Status
Oil Change Due
query:
SELECT
    v.name AS "Vehicle:Link/Vehicle:150",
    v.last_odometer AS "Current Odometer",
    vlo.odometer AS "Last Oil Change Odometer",
    vlo.last_service_date AS "Last Oil Change Date"
FROM
    `tabVehicle` v
LEFT JOIN
    (
        SELECT 
            l.license_plate,
            CAST(MAX(l.odometer) AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS odometer,
            MAX(s.custom_service_date) AS last_service_date
        FROM `tabVehicle Log` l
        INNER JOIN `tabVehicle Service` s 
            ON s.parent = l.name
           AND s.service_item LIKE '%%ENGINE CHANGE OIL%%'
        GROUP BY l.license_plate
    ) vlo ON v.name = vlo.license_plate
    where vlo.last_service_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    v.name;

name: Serial No Warranty Expiry
Sales Partners Commission
query:
SELECT
   sales_partner as "Sales Partner:Link / Sales Partner:220",
   sum(base_net_total) as "Invoiced Amount (Excl. Tax):Currency:220",
   sum(amount_eligible_for_commission) as "Amount Eligible for Commission:Currency:220",
   sum(total_commission) as "Total Commission:Currency:170",
   sum(total_commission)*100 / sum(amount_eligible_for_commission) as "Average Commission Rate:Percent:220"
FROM
   (
      SELECT
         sales_partner,
         base_net_total,
         total_commission,
         amount_eligible_for_commission
      FROM
         `tabSales Invoice` 
      WHERE
         docstatus = 1
         AND IFNULL(base_net_total, 0) > 0
         AND IFNULL(total_commission, 0) > 0

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
         sales_partner,
         base_net_total,
         total_commission,
         amount_eligible_for_commission
      FROM
         `tabPOS Invoice`
      WHERE
         docstatus = 1
         AND IFNULL(base_net_total, 0) > 0
         AND IFNULL(total_commission, 0) > 0
   ) AS sub
GROUP BY
   sales_partner
ORDER BY
   "Total Commission:Currency:120"

name: Open Work Orders
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) < `tabWork Order`.qty
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT name from `tabStock Entry` where work_order =`tabWork Order`.name)

name: Work Orders in Progress
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND `tabWork Order`.status != 'Stopped'
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) < `tabWork Order`.qty
  AND EXISTS (SELECT name from `tabStock Entry` where work_order =`tabWork Order`.name)

name: Completed Work Orders
query:
SELECT
  `tabWork Order`.name as "Work Order:Link/Work Order:200",
  `tabWork Order`.creation as "Date:Date:120",
  `tabWork Order`.production_item as "Item:Link/Item:150",
  `tabWork Order`.qty as "To Produce:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.produced_qty as "Produced:Int:100",
  `tabWork Order`.company as "Company:Link/Company:"
FROM
  `tabWork Order`
WHERE
  `tabWork Order`.docstatus=1
  AND ifnull(`tabWork Order`.produced_qty,0) >= `tabWork Order`.qty

name: Items To Be Requested
query:
SELECT
    tabBin.item_code as "Item:Link/Item:120",
    tabBin.warehouse as "Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:120",
    tabBin.actual_qty as "Actual:Float:90",
    tabBin.indented_qty as "Requested:Float:90",
    tabBin.reserved_qty as "Reserved:Float:90",
    tabBin.ordered_qty as "Ordered:Float:90",
    tabBin.projected_qty as "Projected:Float:90"
FROM
    tabBin, tabItem
WHERE
    tabBin.item_code = tabItem.name
   AND tabBin.projected_qty < 0
ORDER BY
    tabBin.projected_qty ASC
